title: aconitum × semilasianthum
intro: Aconitum × semilasianthum, also known as the hybrid aconitum, is a plant species that results from the cross-breeding of Aconitum lasiocarpum and Aconitum uncinatum. The plant contains aconitine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, which has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aconitum × semilasianthum include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are used in traditional medicine, but caution is advised due to the plant's toxicity and potential side effects.
